prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed sci-fi movie poster for KALKI PROTOCOL, designed as a vertical one-sheet with a mythic cyberpunk India aesthetic. Show a back-facing central figure occupying most of the frame, a mysterious warrior in a dark futuristic long coat with a high collar, standing upright and looking toward a sprawling neon megacity. The figure has dark curly hair tied into a rough bun, a glowing circular earring on one ear, and a powerful silhouette with the face mostly hidden in profile shadow. Behind the head, place a huge radiant golden-orange halo made of concentric rings inscribed with Sanskrit-style sacred text and arcane symbols, giving the character a divine, prophetic presence. Inside and around the silhouette, blend a futuristic version of Mumbai: dense skyscrapers, holographic billboards, elevated structures, reflective waterways, and a cool blue-violet night atmosphere contrasted against the warm halo. Include exactly 3 flying vehicles: 2 high-speed hoverbikes racing across the lower and middle right area with bright magenta engine trails, and 1 small hovering aircraft farther back in the sky on the right. Add one prominent illuminated billboard reading MUMBAI with a smaller Devanagari line beneath it. Scatter additional vertical neon signs with Devanagari text along the buildings. The color palette should be electric cyan, deep indigo, magenta, orange, and gold, with wet reflective surfaces, volumetric haze, dramatic rim lighting, and a polished blockbuster poster finish. Place large futuristic glowing title typography across the lower middle reading KALKI PROTOCOL. Under it, add the tagline THE FINAL ERA BEGINS, then a release line reading "COMING 3125.11", then a multilingual credit line listing "HINDI - TELUGU - TAMIL - KANNADA - MALAYALAM - ENGLISH", and a small hashtag line at the bottom. High contrast, epic scale, premium concept art, seamless double-exposure composition, cyberpunk Mumbai meets Indian mythology, action-packed and divine.
